seo.title: Binance SOL/USDT Funding Rate — 6,099 Settlements Analyzed
seo.description: SOL/USDT funding rate on Binance: -13.32% annualized across 6,099 settlements (Sep 2020–Mar 2026). 72.9% positive rate frequency. Real data from 9.4M+ records.

content.intro: SOL/USDT perpetual futures on Binance — analyzed across 6,099 funding rate settlements spanning Sep 2020 to March 2026 (5.5 years of data). Average funding rate: +0.0002% per 8-hour settlement = -13.32% annualized. 72.9% of settlements are positive (shorts collect). All numbers from Zirodelta's 9.4M+ settlement record dataset — the deepest funding rate analysis available.
content.how_funding_works: Binance calculates SOL/USDT funding rates every 8 hours at 00:00, 08:00, and 16:00 UTC using a time-weighted average of the premium/discount between perpetual and spot prices. The funding rate is capped at ±0.75% per period to prevent extreme rates. Positions held at funding time automatically exchange payments between long and short holders, with no trading required to collect or pay funding.
content.why_this_pair: SOL/USDT generates significant funding rate volatility due to Solana's ecosystem momentum and retail speculation cycles. The pair consistently ranks in Binance's top 5 by perpetual volume, ensuring tight spreads and deep order books for optimal arbitrage execution.

sections.heading: Historical Data (6,099 Settlements)
sections.body: Our dataset contains 6,099 SOL/USDT settlements on Binance over 5.5 years. Average rate: +0.0002% per 8h (-13.32% annualized). 72.9% of settlements are positive — meaning a delta-neutral short position collects funding roughly 5 out of every 7 settlement periods. Range spans from the Binance funding rate floor to ceiling, capturing multiple market cycles including bull runs, corrections, and sideways periods.

sections.heading: Monthly Trends & Seasonality
sections.body: SOL funding is heavily influenced by narrative cycles. Bull runs push rates strongly positive, but FTX-era data creates a negative historical average on some exchanges.

sections.heading: Cross-Exchange Comparison: SOL Across Venues
sections.body: Hyperliquid shows 14.57% annualized for SOL (24,331 settlements). KuCoin at 9.85% (5,533 settlements). Binance SOL is anomalous at -13.32% annualized due to the FTX collapse period in 2022 dragging the average down. Bybit also negative at -19.66%.

sections.heading: Delta-Neutral Strategy Application
sections.body: Buy SOL spot + short SOL perpetual = zero price exposure. Collect funding every 8 hours when positive (72.9% of the time on Binance). Zirodelta's engine automates this with smart venue routing — if Binance rates compress, it checks alternative exchanges for better rates. Cross-exchange routing (e.g., short perp on Binance, buy spot on another exchange) unlocks opportunities that single-exchange strategies miss.

faq.question: What is the average SOL/USDT funding rate on Binance?
faq.answer: Based on 6,099 settlements from Sep 2020 to March 2026, the average is +0.0002% per 8h cycle (-13.32% annualized). 72.9% of settlements are positive.

faq.question: Which exchange has the best SOL funding rate for arbitrage?
faq.answer: Hyperliquid shows 14.57% annualized for SOL (24,331 settlements). KuCoin at 9.85% (5,533 settlements). Binance SOL is anomalous at -13.32% annualized due to the FTX collapse period in 2022 dragging the average down. Bybit also negative at -19.66%.

faq.question: How reliable is SOL/USDT funding rate income on Binance?
faq.answer: 72.9% of 6,099 settlements over 5.5 years were positive. This includes multiple bear markets, making SOL/USDT on Binance one of the more consistent funding pairs. However, rates can turn negative during severe corrections.
